splash_background.description: Minimal splash screen background. Not strictly required, could be a solid #2563EB background with white text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the app using React Native and Expo Router.
Ensure all components are in .js files, not .tsx.
Implement a Splash Screen that shows the Company Name or 'Invoice Generator' cleanly centered with a professional blue background (#2563EB) and white text, then transitions to the main app.
Use a Multi-Page layout using expo-router tabs or stack: 1. Form Page (Company, Invoice, Line Items), 2. Preview Page, 3. Saved Invoices Page.

The Form Page should use a ScrollView with distinct sections (Cards) for Company Details, Invoice Details, and Line Items. Each section should have a subtle gray background (#F9FAFB) with white cards.
For the Line Items section, implement an 'Add Item' button. Show dynamic calculation of Subtotal, GST, and Balance Due.

The Preview Page must look like a formal A4 paper PDF, displaying all the entered data exactly like a professional invoice, complete with a clean tabular layout for line items, bank details at the bottom, and action buttons (Save, PDF, Email) fixed at the bottom of the screen.
Saved Invoices list should show concise info: Invoice number, Client/Company name, total amount, and a 'saved' status chip.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, inputs, totals) as required by the rules.
